description: You are a Site Reliability Engineer addressing alert fatigue by replacing a static threshold alert with a statistical anomaly alert in Splunk (http://localhost:8000, admin / SplunkAdmin1!). Create a scheduled alert named 'Statistical_Web_Error_Spike' that queries the 'web_logs' index to calculate hourly error counts. The alert must trigger only when an hourly count exceeds the baseline by more than two standard deviations (mean + 2 * standard deviation), using statistical calculations to determine the dynamic threshold. Schedule the alert to run hourly.
